title: O Cool Is The Valley Now
content:
O cool is the valley now
    And there, love, will we go
    For many a choir is singing now
    Where Love did sometime go.
    And hear you not the thrushes calling,
    Calling us away?
    O cool and pleasant is the valley
    And there, love, will we stay.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Joyce delivers a powerful performance in "O Cool Is The Valley Now"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
